title: About MiniModding
intro: One person, one game, and an unreasonable amount of time spent making BeamNG.drive mods actually work.

sections.heading: Who I am
paragraphs: Hi, I'm Mini — a BeamNG.drive enthusiast who got tired of downloading mod packs full of broken vehicles, missing textures, and default configs nobody bothered to set up.
I build, test, and maintain every pack on this site myself. If a mod is listed here, it means I've personally driven it, configured it, and decided it's worth your disk space.

sections.heading: What is MiniModding?
paragraphs: MiniModding is a small, curated catalogue of mod packs for BeamNG.drive. The focus is quality over quantity: every vehicle is individually tested, given proper configurations, and shipped with custom thumbnails so your vehicle selector stays clean.
Most packs are free. Subscriber packs help fund the time it takes to keep everything tested and up to date — and subscribers get the bigger, more ambitious releases.

sections.heading: The modding process
paragraphs: Every pack starts with a long testing phase: each vehicle is loaded, driven, and checked for broken Jbeams, missing materials, and performance problems. Anything that doesn't hold up gets fixed or replaced — never shipped.

After testing comes configuration: sensible default setups, custom presets where it makes sense, and consistent thumbnails. Then the pack is bundled, versioned, and documented in the changelog before release.
